summary: Iteration 69: Testimonial Display Unification - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested Homepage testimonials section (5-card carousel with Video/Transformations tabs) and Transformations page (/transformations) with 3-column grid displaying template, graphic, and video testimonials.

issues: One video shows 'Video unavailable' from YouTube - this is a YouTube content issue, not a code bug. The video may have been removed/made private.

critical_code_review_comments: TestimonialCarousel5Card.jsx: Clean 5-card carousel component with proper data-testid attributes, auto-play every 5s, hover lift animation, dot indicators
TestimonialsSection.jsx: Correctly implements tab switching between Video and Transformations tabs, Video tab active by default with bg-[#D4AF37]
TransformationsPage.jsx: 3-column grid (lg:grid-cols-3) working correctly for all testimonial types, proper filtering via tabs (All, Text Stories, Graphics, Videos)
Both pages correctly implement dark overlay lightbox for graphic testimonials and YouTube dialog for video testimonials
context_for_next_testing_agent: Testimonial display has been unified across Homepage and Transformations page. Homepage uses TestimonialCarousel5Card component in TestimonialsSection with Video/Transformations tabs. TransformationsPage uses 3-column grid for all testimonial types. Template testimonials (text stories) show full card in lightbox. Graphic testimonials show image lightbox. Video testimonials open YouTube dialog.

homepage_video_tab_default.details: Video tab active by default with gold background (bg-[#D4AF37]), 5-card carousel displays video testimonials with play button overlays

homepage_transformations_tab.details: Clicking Transformations tab switches carousel to show graphic testimonials, tab styling updates correctly

homepage_video_click_modal.details: Clicking video card opens YouTube dialog with iframe embed, autoplay enabled

homepage_graphic_click_lightbox.details: Clicking graphic card opens dark overlay lightbox (rgba(0,0,0,0.85)) with full image

homepage_carousel_dots.details: 10 dot indicators present below carousel, clicking dots navigates to corresponding testimonial

homepage_5card_layout.details: 5 cards visible in carousel (1 center + 4 offset cards), hover lift animation working

transformations_page_hero.details: Hero section displays 'Transformations' title and 'Stories of Healing, Growth & Awakening' subtitle

transformations_page_filters.details: Tab filters (All, Text Stories, Graphics, Videos) work correctly, search bar functional

transformations_page_3col_grid.details: Grid uses lg:grid-cols-3, displays 38-44 testimonials depending on filter

transformations_video_play_overlay.details: Video testimonials in grid have gold play button overlay (#D4AF37)

transformations_video_modal.details: Clicking video testimonial opens YouTube dialog with iframe embed

transformations_graphic_lightbox.details: Clicking graphic/template testimonial opens dark overlay lightbox with full testimonial card
